sections.instruction: Questions 1-9: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Question 10: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Which map shows the correct location of the seller’s house?

sections.instruction: Questions 11-13: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 14-20: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: The paintings will be displayed in the Star Gallery and in a nearby (11) {{BLANK}}. The sale of pictures will begin at (12) {{BLANK}} on Thursday, and there will be refreshments beforehand. The money raised will all be used to help (13) {{BLANK}} children in New Zealand and other countries.

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: What instructions were the students give about their project? A they must do this. B they can do this if they want to. C they cannot do this. Write the correct letter A, B or C next to questions 21-25. Questions 26-30: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

options: B they can do this if they want to

questions.content:
Other requirements for the project
• Extract chosen from the author’s work must reflect the (26) {{BLANK}} and {{BLANK}} of the author.
• Students must find sound effects and (27) {{BLANK}} to match the texts they choose.
• Students must use a (28) {{BLANK}} of computer software programs to make the video.
• Students must include information about the (29) {{BLANK}} of all material.
Criteria for assessment
• Completion of all components – 25%
• (30) {{BLANK}} (must represent essence of author’s work) – 50%
• Artistic and technical design of video – 25%

sections.instruction: Questions 31-33: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 34-40: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content:
31. ‘Extremophiles’ are life forms that can live in hostile conditions.
32. The researchers think that some of the organisms they found in Antarctica are {{BLANK}}.
33. The researchers were the first people to find life forms in the Antarctica {{BLANK}}.
options: 31. A isolated areas / B hostile conditions / C new habitats
32. A new species / B ancient colonies / C types of insects
33. A in the soil / B under the rock surface / C on the rocks

questions.content:
How the extremophiles survive
34. Access to the sun’s heat can create a {{BLANK}} for some organisms.
35. The deeper the soil, the higher the {{BLANK}} of salt.
36. Salt can protect organisms against the effects of {{BLANK}} even at very low temperatures.
37. All living things must have access to {{BLANK}} water.
38. Salt plays a part in the process of {{BLANK}} which prevents freezing.
39. The environment of {{BLANK}} is similar to the dry valleys of Antarctica.
40. This research may provide evidence of the existence of extraterrestrial life forms and their possible {{BLANK}} on other planets.
